features: 【8pcs Small Christmas Bags for Xmas Gift】: The package comes with 8pcs small Xmas tote bags with handle in 8 different Christmas style. The paper bag size is 21x26x12cm which is ideal for Christmas party gift supplies decorations.

【Classic and lovely Christmas design】: The Christmas tote bags can be used as small or medium gift bags with different pattern such as Christmas tree, Snowmen and so on for your Xmas festival, family party, festival cerebration.

【Sturdy and Xmas party bags】 : Each Xmas gift bag is made with non-woven fabric making it firm and Sturdy which is not easily damaged. The gift bags are waterproof, light,very easy to clean and can be recycled, reused.

【Strong handles bag for easy carrying】: All Christmas tote bags come with strong handles for easy carrying. With reinforced bottom, not easy to break even filling with many stuffs, the thickened handles make you can carry it out easily.

【Widely uses of Christmas gift bags for kids】: Fashionable Christmas kids party favor bags is perfect for carrying container of cookies, bunny toys, bunny dolls, treat, candy or other Christmas gifts for giving to friends family teachers or neighbors.
